description: Design a horizontal axis wind turbine (HAWT) blade in QBlade using the NACA 4412 airfoil with a 360-degree polar pre-loaded in the NREL 5MW sample project located at /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/. The blade must have at least 5 blade stations and a total length of approximately 10 meters. Save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/hawt_blade.wpa.
